title: GitHub Copilot Tool Tips
description: A curated collection of tools and resources

tools.name: Visual Studio Code
tools.description: The most popular editor for GitHub Copilot. Get AI-powered code completion, chat, edit mode, and agent mode directly in your development workflow.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot App
tools.description: A desktop application purpose-built for agent-driven development. Run multiple agent sessions in parallel, each on its own branch, and manage the full development lifecycle — without switching between your terminal, IDE, and browser.
